objective: turn current-coarse exchange proxies into mesh-aware evidence
target_evidence: exact-label medium/fine Q_wall_W mdot_exchange tau_recirc wall/core contrast
pass_criteria: nonempty exact-label rows and accepted same-label mesh/GCI
when_to_launch_or_harvest: after active S13 sampler smoke passes and row is claimed
forbidden_shortcut: do not use partial/failed smoke rows as mesh/GCI

target_evidence: RAF RMF closed fraction Ri V_recirc mdot_exchange tau_recirc
pass_criteria: RAF and RMF below predeclared near-onset threshold with finite same-QOI UQ
why_needed: needed to locate transition from ordinary to recirculating lane
when_to_launch_or_harvest: after current CAND001/S13 blockers are resolved or fail
forbidden_shortcut: do not tune Q/insulation after seeing onset outcome

objective: replace fragmented proxy with closed recirculation volume
target_evidence: connected CV surfaces volume fraction and topology persistence
pass_criteria: dominant connected closed CV or explicit fail-closed fragmentation status
why_needed: needed for true recirculation fraction map
forbidden_shortcut: do not infer closed volume from rendered velocity pictures

target_evidence: beta DeltaT g L U on same CV/window/source-property row
pass_criteria: finite same-window same-CV Ri with source/property labels
why_needed: needed for onset physics rather than visual trend
forbidden_shortcut: do not mix CVs windows or property modes

objective: extend coverage toward weaker recirculation/ordinary flow
target_evidence: Salt1 or low-Q/high-insulation source with same fields and endpoint metrics
pass_criteria: terminal finite fields and ordinary/near-onset screen pass
why_needed: needed because Salt2-4 all show persistent reverse proxies
when_to_launch_or_harvest: only under separate scheduler row with source contract
forbidden_shortcut: do not expand train split without split policy

target_evidence: common-range velocity panels plus same-source RAF/RMF/closed fraction labels
pass_criteria: figure labels trace to same-window metrics with UQ status
forbidden_shortcut: do not annotate figure with mismatched proxy values
